meaning: v.狗吠,(因痛而)叫喊,叫喊着说
examples: I learn of their Yelp account.
From the corner of the store, he heard his son yelp, "What!"
You can write a draft review, but you have to visit the Yelp website to post it.
PayPal employees later spawned a number of other startups such as YouTube and Yelp.
Moreover, who really knows what anyone might have done in 1999 (Nextag) or 2004 (Yelp)?
